title: Section 22
content: 1[22. Professional or other misconduct defined.-- For the purposes of this Act, the expression "professional or other misconduct" shall be deemed to include any act or omission provided in any of the Schedules but nothing in this section shall be construed to limit or abridge in any way the power conferred or duty cast on the Director (Discipline) under sub-section (1) of section 21 to inquire into the conduct of any member of the Institute under any other circumstances.]
footnote: 1. Subs. by Act 7 of 2006, s. 21, for section 22 (w.e.f. 17-11-2006).
